en: Thank you. Thank you. Beyond boundaries. What a theme, huh? Now when I think of boundaries,
I think of rules, regulations, and restrictions. And I think of the parents and the teachers
ko: 규정과 제한들 그리고 그 경계를 지키게 하는

en: and the supervisors who hold us accountable with regard to those boundaries. Now that's
not a bad thing. I know if you're like me, I need supervisors, I need someone holding
ko: 그건 나쁜 게 아닙니다 저도 감독이 필요하거든요

en: me accountable to do the right thing. But beyond boundaries is something different.
ko: 올바른 일을 하게 해줄 사람이요 하지만 경계를 넘어서는 건 다릅니다

en: I think of those leaders, those teachers, those supervisors, those parents who inspire
us to go beyond the call of duty. To do more than we have to. To do it not because they
ko: 해야 하는 것 이상을 하게 만드는 분들 시켜서가 아니라 스스로

en: tell us, but because we want to. I would like to share with you what the research says about
ko: 해야 하는 것 이상을 하게 만드는 분들 시켜서가 아니라 스스로
